title: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten Season 2 Releases Episode 4 Preview
content: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten Season 2 released the preview for Episode 4, which is slated to release on Saturday, April 24. The upcoming episode is titled “A Stay-at-Home Date with the Angel.” Also Read: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten Reveals How Many Times Mahiru Shiina Said “Amane-Kun” in Season 1…
author: Anime Corner

title: Tokyo-Based Developer Shapefarm's Orbitals Switch 2 Game Streams Gameplay Trailer With Director Commentary
content: Tokyo-based developer Shapefarm unveiled on Thursday a gameplay reveal trailer for its new two player cooperative game Orbitals . The game's creative director Marcos Ramos and game director Jakob Lundgren provide commentary for the trailer's footage and present a segment where they play through an area: The game will…
author: ANN

title: Shigeru Chiba Reprises Role as Shigeo Shiba in Patlabor EZY Anime
content: Chiba has played the role since the original anime's debut almost 40 years ago. The anime will consist of eight episodes, and will debut theatrically as three films on May 15, August 14, and March 2027.
author: ANN

title: Gundam Creator Slams Japanese Government as “Authoritarian”
content: The Gundam franchise has easily earned its place as the biggest mech series in the anime world, with a steady stream of anime series and films hitting the screen. The long-running anime juggernaut is a brainchild of creator Yoshiyuki Tomino, who is now 84 years old and still hitting the circuit to talk about his…
author: ComicBook

title: Original Anime Movie 'The Ribbon Hero' Announced for August 2026
content: Netflix Japan announced an original anime movie titled The Ribbon Hero on Thursday, revealing the main staff, and a teaser visual (pictured). The anime movie based on Osamu Tezuka 's Ribbon no Kishi manga will premiere worldwide exclusively on Netflix in August 2026.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Webtoon-Based Live-Action Series The Legend of Kitchen Soldier Reveals Teaser Video, Poster
content: The upcoming live-action The Legend of Kitchen Soldier series based on the webtoon of the same name released on Thursday its teaser trailer, highlighting a stark contrast in military life before and after the arrival of its protagonist. The staff also revealed a poster for the series on Tuesday.
author: ANN

title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Switch 2 Game's Overview Trailer Previews Creature Discovery, Worlds
content: Nintendo began streaming on Thursday an overview trailer for the Yoshi and the Mysterious Book game. The video previews Yoshi's abilities, creature discovery, worlds, villains Bowser Jr. and Kamek, and amiibo support: The game launches for Nintendo Switch 2 on May 21. In the game, Yoshi jumps into a magical book.
author: ANN

title: Soul Eater Teases Big Announcement As Fans Wait For a Remake
content: Throughout anime’s history, there have been numerous franchises that fans have been dying to see return to the small screen. One of the biggest asks from anime fans has been a new Soul Eater series, which makes sense when you look at the history of the television series.
author: ComicBook

title: I Grew the Greatest Home Garden with my OP Cultivation Skill? Manga Ends
content: Square Enix 's Manga UP! website published the fourth and final part of the final chapter of Suzumi and Shichio Kuzu 's I Grew the Greatest Home Garden with my OP Cultivation Skill? ( Saibai Cheat de Saikyō Saien: Eh, Tada no Katei Saien Desu Kedo? ) manga on Thursday. Square Enix 's Manga UP!
author: ANN

title: Tezuka's Ribbon no Kishi Gets New Anime Film After 27 Years, Streaming on Netflix This August
content: A new anime film based on Osamu Tezuka’s Ribbon no Kishi ( Princess Knight ) has been announced, marking the franchise’s first new anime project in 27 years. Titled THE RIBBON HERO , the film is set for a global release on Netflix this August.
author: Anime Corner
